metadata.lyrics:
[00:12.10] She's simply awesome

[00:44.87] She said I was the tiger she wanted to tame

[00:53.83] Now we're sharing the same dream
[00:58.10] And our hearts, they beat as one
[01:03.43] No more love on the run
[01:10.20] I lose my cool when she steps in the room, mm
[01:18.52] And I get so excited just from her perfume, mm
[01:27.23] Electric eyes that you can't ignore
[01:35.54] And passion burns you like never before, mm
[01:44.24] I was in search of a good time
[01:48.21] Just running my game, yeah
[01:52.76] Love was the furthest
[01:54.59] Furthest from my mind, yeah

[02:01.30] Now we're sharing the same dream (don't wanna stop)
[02:05.67] And our hearts, they beat as one, ooh

[03:06.47] Caribbean Queen
